calendar.matters:
Petition For Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann making a special appearance for and with John Mack.

The Court granted the Petition for Recovery of Property on Deposit in Treasury (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Continued To Jun-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on June 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
